title: MessageEnvelope
description: Standard wrapper for all messages on the broker. Every worker publishes and consumes this shape.

event_type.description: Identifies the event and selects the payload schema.

event_id.description: Unique ID for this message instance.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the message was produced.

source.description: Identifier of the worker or system that produced this message.

correlation_id.description: Traces a chain of related messages across workers.

causation_id.description: event_id of the message that directly caused this one. Null for originating events.

retry_count.description: Number of times this message has been retried. 0 on first delivery.

payload_type.description: Optional hint for payload schema routing within a worker (e.g. 'google-sheets-v1').

payload.description: Event-specific data. Schema is determined by event_type.
